comparisonCards.title: Baseline vs With Superpowers Mounted
comparisonCards.summary: Canonical batched ContextBench run comparing baseline Codex against Codex with Superpowers pre-seeded into the isolated runtime.

parameters.label: Additional Prompt
parameters.value: Superpowers resources are mounted in this runtime and should be used when relevant, including planning, test-first thinking, and verification discipline. However, this is still a ContextBench benchmark task, not an open-ended workflow exercise. Do not stop at planning or process-only outputs.

notes: Pass@1 is computed via the SWE-bench harness on generated patches. Completed Run Rate remains a separate fork-specific execution-status metric.
